duration: 41728.585 ms  plan:
Query Text: SET statement_timeout='58s'; SET idle_session_timeout='58s';
SELECT
  e.name,
  n.nspname AS schema,
  e.default_version,
  x.extversion AS installed_version,
  e.comment,
  ev.schema AS default_version_schema
FROM
  pg_available_extensions e
  LEFT JOIN pg_extension x ON e.name = x.extname
  LEFT JOIN pg_namespace n ON x.extnamespace = n.oid
  LEFT JOIN pg_available_extension_versions ev
    ON ev.name = e.name AND ev.version = e.default_version;

statement: DROP FUNCTION get_throwbacks(uuid,uuid,integer,integer,integer);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_throwbacks(
  u_id UUID, 
  p_id UUID, 
  current_month INT, 
  current_day INT, 
  limit_count INT
)
RETURNS SETOF messages AS $$
BEGIN
  IF u_id IS NULL OR p_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;

  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT m.*
  FROM messages m
  WHERE 
    (
      (m.sender_id = u_id AND m.receiver_id = p_id) 
      OR 
      (m.sender_id = p_id AND m.receiver_id = u_id)
    )
    AND m.media_url IS NOT NULL
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') = current_month
    AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') = current_day
    ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
    LIMIT limit_count;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;
